description: Capabilities for the main window's own webview. #360 Slice D: scoped to `webviews`, NOT `windows` — main now hosts plugin child webviews (Window::add_child), and Capability::windows's own doc comment (tauri-utils) says a windows-scoped grant applies to EVERY webview of that window regardless of `webviews`, which would hand a plugin child webview this entire grant (confirmed live in the #360 multiwebview spike, fix/360-plugin-embed commit e337c95). `webviews: ["main"]` matches only the main window's own initial webview (whose label is "main" by Tauri's convention for a single-webview window at creation), never a `plugin-*`-labeled child. tests/acl_manifest.rs's `webview_scope_guard_denies_windows_scoped_leak_to_child_webview` is the CI guard against ever reintroducing `windows` here.
